finding_results.notes: Kai's setup now distinguishes Lena's report from his inference: he has the logs, the lost laps, and the lie, but not the motive. The confrontation now confirms the pleasure/addiction motive only after he asks for it directly.

Margot's dependence is now rendered as present bodily compulsion: saliva, skin-memory at the wrist, the urge to fasten the interface, and explicit physical craving during the dock confession. The opening also frames her deadened pulse as shock, not the disappearance of desire.
Margot keeps the deliberate 'flat' emphasis in her face description, while Kai's vocal register is now rendered as 'level' with the humor stripped off.
Petra's physical grounding now uses under-eye fatigue and ink on her finger instead of repeating the grey-streaked hair detail.
The chapter retains a single fluorescent reference in the mirror beat and removes the later repeated uses.

Parenthetical and expository em-dashes were converted to full clauses or punctuation alternatives across the opening, Petra scene, and dock confrontation. Mechanical verification after revision found 0 prose lines containing em-dashes.

Sentence openings were varied across all three scenes rather than defaulting to repeated 'She' starts. Mechanical verification after revision found 24 sentences beginning with 'She,' under the packet threshold.

finding_results.notes: Petra scene (lines 77-85): broke the consecutive bare-confirmation chain by having Margot combine her February/restricted-ops/crash answer into one line and replacing the second bare 'Yes' with 'Every one of them' — Margot-direct but not a generic confirmation. Petra self-corrects mid-exchange (touches glasses, consolidates her accusation), consistent with her character profile's hedging-under-pressure and self-correction-toward-precision traits. The scene retains its clinical interrogation shape but no longer has 3+ consecutive one-beat assent responses. Kai scene (lines 157-205): restructured from accusation-confirmation ladder to Margot-driven confession. Kai opens with institutional data (the feed logs) rather than personal accusation, stalls, then manages one personal statement ('She lost two laps'). Margot volunteers the full confession unprompted — the desync, the heart-rate pushing, the lie about acceptable parameters, the severity she concealed, and why she didn't speak up. This inverts the Petra scene's dynamic: there Petra extracts information; here Margot provides it before Kai can build to accusation. Removed echo exchanges ('And you kept connecting'/'I kept connecting', 'Tomas's was twelve'/'Yeah', 'Seventy-seven sessions'/'That sounds right') that duplicated the Petra scene's mechanics. Restored snapshot roughness in Stuttgart passage ('I — I noticed', 'Every athlete's got'). The two scenes now run on materially different conversational mechanics while preserving all must-land beats and the transmission-vector payoff.

finding_results.notes: Reworked the opening, Petra scene, and dock confrontation to land through direct sensory statement, clinical specificity, and flat declarative confession instead of repeated negation-and-correction emphasis.
Cut the abstract forgiveness/trust gloss after Margot's confession and let Kai's response move through a concrete memory of Lena, bodily pressure, the minimal reply, and his exit.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 15 in place to keep the same three-scene aftermath architecture while fixing the packet's causality and craft blockers: Kai now confronts Margot from earned knowledge rather than pre-solved motive, Margot's feed addiction is rendered as present bodily craving rather than diagnosis-only explanation, Petra's repeated physical tags were trimmed, and the recurrence targets for fluorescent, em-dashes, and 'She' sentence-openers were brought under threshold.

Revised both confrontation scenes to eliminate the shared interrogation-ladder pattern. The Petra scene retains its clinical-review mechanics with tighter turn structure and no consecutive bare confirmations. The Kai scene was substantially restructured: instead of Kai accusing and Margot confirming in sequence, Margot now drives the confession voluntarily while Kai circles through institutional data and processes physically. All must-land beats preserved (phantom, feed log review, suspension, addiction described plainly, transmission vector payoff). Restored productive spoken roughness from the snapshot in the Stuttgart passage. No new continuity contradictions introduced.
Chapter 15 now varies its emphasis patterns across the three major scenes and exits the dock confrontation on concrete image and physical pressure rather than paraphrased moral summary.
